nameMeanings.name: Prophett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Pierre, Solange, Antoine, Philomene, Andre, Etienne, Francois, Guerda, Huguette, Jacques, Lucien, Marie-Ange.
French and West Indian (mainly Haiti, also Martinique) (Prophète): nickname, possibly ironic, from prophète ‘prophet’. This surname was brought to the US from the West Indies (mostly Haiti).

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Anne Prophett was born on 1 January 1432, in Downham, Essex, England, United Kingdom. She died on 8 April 1487, in Ulcombe, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Anne Prophett est née le 1 janvier 1432, à Downham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée le 8 avril 1487, à Ulcombe, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Anne Prophett wurde am 1. Januar 1432 in Downham, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie starb am 8. April 1487 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Ulcombe, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Anne Prophett è nata il il 1 gennaio 1432 nel Downham, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 8 aprile 1487, nel Ulcombe, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni.
